introSection:
Toboggans was a pair of steel roller coasters located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. The rides were built by Chance Rides and opened in 1972. They were located in the Carousel Circle area, where the Mini Himalaya is today.

The two units appear to have had a different support structure, indicating they were permanent units.
fullText:
Toboggans was a pair of steel roller coasters located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. The rides were built by Chance Rides and opened in 1972. They were located in the Carousel Circle area, where the Mini Himalaya is today.

The two units appear to have had a different support structure, indicating they were permanent units.
